What We Do

QuickBooks & Accounting Services for Orlando Small Businesses

From QuickBooks setup and cleanup to monthly bookkeeping, payroll, and tax preparation — everything your Orlando business needs in one place.

Monthly Bookkeeping

Accurate, up-to-date books every month. We categorize transactions, reconcile accounts, and keep your records clean so you're always audit-ready.

QuickBooks Setup & Cleanup

As a QuickBooks Level 2 ProAdvisor in Orlando, we set up and clean up your QuickBooks to run the way your business actually works — fast and correctly.

Payroll Processing

Certified QuickBooks Payroll support for your employees and contractors. We handle calculations, filings, and keep you compliant with Florida payroll tax requirements.

Tax Preparation

Business and individual tax returns prepared accurately for Orlando area clients. We find every legitimate deduction to minimize what you owe and eliminate filing stress.

P&L & Balance Sheet Reporting

Clear, readable financial statements showing exactly where your money is going and how your business is really performing — not just a pile of numbers.

Account Reconciliations

Monthly bank and credit card reconciliations to catch errors, flag discrepancies, and ensure your QuickBooks matches your actual accounts every month.

Our Process

Three Steps to Financial Clarity

Simple, efficient, and built around your schedule.

01

Free Consultation

We start with a free call to understand your Orlando business, your pain points, and exactly what you need. No pressure, no commitment.

02

Tailored Plan

We build a customized plan around your business size, industry, and goals. Clear scope of work and exact pricing before anything starts.

03

We Handle the Rest

Clean books every month, responsive support whenever you have questions, and financial clarity all year long.

QuickBooks Level 2 ProAdvisor • Certified Payroll • BBB Accredited
About Ryan Shea

Your Orlando Business Finances, In Good Hands

Shea Business Solutions is a small business accounting firm serving the Orlando, FL area. As a QuickBooks Level 2 ProAdvisor and Certified QuickBooks Payroll specialist, I work directly with small business owners to get their finances organized, accurate, and working for them.

With over 10 years of hands-on QuickBooks and accounting experience, I've helped businesses across Orlando and Central Florida — from construction companies and restaurants to law offices and medical practices — build clean books and understand their numbers.

Whether you're starting fresh with QuickBooks, need a major cleanup, or want reliable monthly bookkeeping and tax support, I'm responsive, honest, and committed to your success.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions from Orlando small business owners about QuickBooks, bookkeeping, and accounting services.

We provide comprehensive bookkeeping services for Orlando-area small businesses, including QuickBooks setup and management, monthly reconciliations, P&L and balance sheet reporting, and tax preparation. Our goal is to give you clean books and clear financial visibility every month.

A QuickBooks Level 2 ProAdvisor is a certified expert with advanced QuickBooks knowledge — beyond the basic level. We can set up your QuickBooks from scratch, clean up years of messy data, build custom reporting, integrate payroll, and train your team. It means you're working with someone who truly knows the software inside and out.

If your books aren't accurate and up to date, you're likely missing deductions and overpaying. We review your financial records, identify overlooked deductions, and implement strategies to reduce your tax liability legally. Many clients are surprised how much they were leaving on the table.

Absolutely — this is one of our most common services. Whether your QuickBooks hasn't been touched in years or was set up incorrectly, we do a full cleanup and rebuild so your data is accurate, your reports make sense, and you can move forward with confidence. We handle one-year and multi-year cleanups.

Monthly bookkeeping starts at $200/month, with the price scaling based on your transaction volume and complexity. Tax preparation starts as low as $90. Cleanup work is quoted after a free assessment. We keep pricing transparent — you'll always know exactly what you're paying before we start.

We work with a wide range of Orlando-area small businesses including construction companies, gyms and fitness studios, restaurants, law offices, dental practices, manufacturing businesses, bakeries, and med spas. Every industry has unique financial needs and we understand the differences.

Same-day response is our standard. One of the most common complaints business owners have about their accountants is that they can't get a timely answer. We prioritize fast, clear communication — you'll always hear back from us the same business day.

Real-World Insights

QuickBooks Mistakes I See Orlando Businesses Make

After working with hundreds of small businesses across Central Florida, here are the most common and costly QuickBooks errors we fix every month.

Mixing Personal & Business Expenses

This is the number one problem I see in Orlando construction and service businesses. Running personal purchases through the business account creates a tax nightmare, inflates apparent expenses, and can trigger an audit. The fix: separate accounts, clean categorization, and an owner draw account set up correctly in QuickBooks.

Skipping Monthly Reconciliations

Many Orlando restaurant and retail owners go months without reconciling their bank accounts in QuickBooks. By tax season, there are duplicate transactions, missing entries, and unexplained discrepancies that take days to untangle. Monthly reconciliations catch errors when they are small, not after they have compounded into a crisis.

Wrong Payroll Setup for Florida

Florida has specific payroll tax rules that out-of-the-box QuickBooks does not always configure correctly, especially for industries like healthcare and construction with unique worker classification rules. Misclassifying employees as contractors can result in significant back taxes and penalties from the Florida Department of Revenue.

Sound familiar? These are exactly the issues we fix every day for Orlando small businesses.
